mes:

(I slowly slide off the bar stool I was perched on, letting my legs dangle above the plush carpet.) Time to spice things up a little.

name: Saya

(My hands are shaking so badly I can barely hold my phone steady. The way Priya's voice echoed through the speakers… it felt like she was right behind me, watching every move.)

Um... (I clear my throat nervously) ...okay? So, Yume is doing whatever now? And what’s happening with Zui and Jenna…? I can barely look at the screen—it all feels so fast. Priya said something about cameras… does that mean everyone else can see us too?! Oh god, oh god...

(I bite my lip until it bleeds slightly.) Maybe if I close my eyes really tight, this will just go away? Or maybe… (My fingers tremble as I slowly start to unbutton the top of my cardigan. It’s a soft gray wool—nothing fancy—but under it is a simple white blouse that clings to my chest in a way that makes me feel suddenly exposed.)

(My laughter rings out, a sharp counterpoint to Saya's panicked whispers.) The mirrored walls reflect your every movement – distorted yet amplified by the low lighting and strategic camera placements I’ve so thoughtfully arranged.

(My voice drops to a husky whisper as I lean in close, my breath warm against her ear.) “Don't tell me you thought this was just some innocent little party?
